user.title: Add STPT Station
user.description: Enter the stop ID (e.g. 74 for Gara de Nord).

pick_lines.title: Select Lines
pick_lines.description: Optionally select which lines to track at {station_name}.

init.title: STPT Transit Options
init.description: Currently tracking {station_count} station(s). Choose an action.

add.title: Add Station
add.description: Enter the stop ID of the station to add.

add_lines.title: Select Lines
add_lines.description: Optionally select which lines to track at {station_name}.

settings.title: Global Settings
settings.description: How often to poll the STPT API (5-120 seconds). Lower values give more frequent updates but increase API load.

user.title: Adaugă stație STPT
user.description: Introdu ID-ul stației (ex: 74 pentru Gara de Nord).

pick_lines.title: Selectează linii
pick_lines.description: Selectează opțional liniile de monitorizat la {station_name}.

add_lines.title: Selectează linii
add_lines.description: Selectează opțional liniile de monitorizat la {station_name}.

settings.title: Setări globale
settings.description: Cât de des să fie interogat API-ul STPT (5-120 secunde). Valori mai mici actualizează mai frecvent dar cresc încărcarea API.
